tags.name: Bradley Lake Hydroelectric Project
tags.owner: State of Alaska, Alaska Energy Authority

tags.description: "The plant will be a 375 kW, run-of-river system and is estimated to produce 1,000 MWh/yr. The project consists of a small diversion dam and intake, a 4,500-ft penstock, a Pelton impulse turbine, and 5,000 feet of access roads. " www.akenergyauthority.org
